session.user:
Run the following pytest command in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the full results. Do NOT fix anything - just report:
``` python -m pytest tests/unit/cli/test_pr_json.py tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/test_metadata_helpers.py tests/commands/pr/test_view.py tests/commands/pr/test_remote_paths.py -x --tb=short 2>&1 | head -100 ```
session.assistant: I'll run that pytest command for you and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
